posts.title: The Country You Can Never Stop Leaving
posts.excerpt: Tarkovsky believed childhood was not something behind us but something we keep failing to return to. This is about that distance, and what it costs.

posts.title: The Conversation Was Never About Winning
posts.excerpt: Socrates didn't argue to defeat people. He asked questions because he genuinely didn't know, and he needed someone else in the room to find out.
